

```{python}
import anndata as ad
import scanpy as sc
import polars as pl
from great_tables import GT
adata = sc.read_h5ad('data/adata_labeled.h5ad')
print(adata.obs)
print(adata.X)
```

count treg

```{python}
obs = pl.from_pandas(adata.obs)
obs.group_by('level3').len()
```

normalize

```{python}
sc.pp.normalize_total(adata)
sc.pp.log1p(adata)

# Identify highly variable genes
sc.pp.highly_variable_genes(adata, min_mean=0.0125, max_mean=3, min_disp=0.5)
adata.raw = adata  # Save raw data
adata = adata[:, adata.var.highly_variable]

# Scale data and compute PCA
sc.pp.scale(adata, max_value=10)
sc.tl.pca(adata, svd_solver="arpack")
```


```{python}
# Compute neighbors and the UMAP projection
sc.pp.neighbors(adata, n_neighbors=10, n_pcs=40)
sc.tl.umap(adata)

# Plot the UMAP (e.g., coloring by groups if available)
sc.pl.umap(adata, color="cluster")
sc.pl.umap(adata, color="level1")
sc.pl.umap(adata, color="level2")
sc.pl.umap(adata, color="level3")
```

compare to auto cluster


```{python}
for res in [0.02, 0.5, 2.0]:
    sc.tl.leiden(
        adata, key_added=f"leiden_res_{res:4.2f}", resolution=res, flavor="igraph",

    )
```


```{python}
sc.pl.umap(
    adata,
    color=["leiden_res_0.02", "leiden_res_0.50", "leiden_res_2.00"],
    legend_loc="on data",
)
```

```{python}
marker_genes = {
    "Treg": ["FOXP3", "IKZF2", "IL2RA", "IL2RB"],
    "Tconv": ["GZMA"],
    "CD8": ["CD8A", "CD8B", "GZMA"],
    "CD4": ["CD4", "IL7R", "TRBC2"],
}
for res in [0.02, "0.50", "2.00"]:
    sc.pl.dotplot(
        adata,
        marker_genes,
        groupby=f"leiden_res_{res}",
        standard_scale="var",
    )

obs = pl.from_pandas(adata.obs)

counts = obs.group_by("leiden_res_2.00").len().with_columns(
    pl.col('leiden_res_2.00').cast(pl.Utf8).cast(pl.Int64).alias('res2_int')).sort("res2_int")
GT(counts)
```

cluster 3 and 4  likely treg based on high foxp3/helios expression = 263 cells, much higher than author annotations
